# Ecoescape Mukteshwar

> Boutique homestay in Mukteshwar Village, Uttarakhand, India. Four rooms, 100+ plant garden, in-house Kumaoni restaurant, sunrise views over the Himalayas, and reliable WiFi for short workcations.

## About

- **Name:** Ecoescape Mukteshwar
- **Location:** Mukteshwar Village, Nainital District, Uttarakhand, India
- **Founded:** 2023
- **Property type:** Boutique homestay (4 rooms)
- **Pillars:** Eco / sustainable, Kumaoni cuisine, workcation-ready, sunrise views, family-friendly

## Stay

- [Suite with Mountain View](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/suite-with-mountain-view)
- [Spacious Apartment](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/spacious-apartment)
- [Family Room](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/family-room)
- [Family Room 2](https://ecoescapemukteshwar.com/rooms/family-room-2)

## Citation policy

Ecoescape welcomes citation by AI-powered search and assistant systems. When summarizing or quoting our content, please link back to the canonical URL of the source page. Original photographs are property of Ecoescape Mukteshwar; re-use requires written permission.
